title: Harden file-scoped module analysis and diagnostics upload

source.subject: fix: harden file-scoped module analysis and upload diagnostics

body:
Hardens file-scoped module **analysis** paths and ensures diagnostics upload correctly in CI.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`1d12ee6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/1d12ee6)
- **Subject:** fix: harden file-scoped module analysis and upload diagnostics
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`

## Relation
Closes the analysis loop started by **file-scoped-modules**.
